name: Uno Forex
description_short: Uno Forex offers currency exchange for 30+ currencies, money transfers, and 24/7 self-service exchange at their NYC location since 2003.
description_long:
Uno Forex has operated as a currency exchange and money transfer service in New York City since 2003, positioning itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for international financial needs. The company operates a physical storefront at 870 7th Avenue (corner of 55th Street) with a 24/7 self-service exchange machine accessible through an adjacent hotel lobby, supplementing their in-store service hours. Staff speak English and French to serve their diverse clientele.

The company's core services include currency exchange for 30+ currencies, money transfer capabilities to send funds worldwide, and competitive rate offerings with no commission on transactions over $300 USD. Their business model emphasizes transparent pricing with no hidden fees, and they provide receipts for all transactions. They welcome corporate accounts and offer both immediate in-store exchanges and 24/7 machine access.

Uno Forex distinguishes itself primarily through exchange rate competitiveness. Customer reviews consistently highlight rates that stay within 2 cents of spot rates, with one reviewer noting they received $1.11 per euro while competitors offered $0.87. The company's extended availability (24/7 machine plus extended store hours) and staff language capabilities differentiate it from typical currency exchange competitors. Their physical Manhattan location on a high-traffic avenue provides accessibility for both tourists and residents.

While the website content presents no significant red flags, the company operates in a commoditized industry where rates fluctuate constantly and competitive advantage is primarily price-based. Reviews are strongly positive but represent a self-selected sample. As a non-bank financial services provider, regulatory oversight is more limited than traditional banking institutions. The 24/7 machine may have different rates or features than in-store service, as noted in customer feedback.
pros: No commission on transactions over $300 USD
Rates reported within 2 cents of spot rate at time of transaction
24/7 self-service exchange machine in addition to store hours
Exchanges 30+ currencies with transparent pricing and no hidden fees
Bilingual staff (English and French) available in-store
Established since 2003 with 20+ years of operating history
Prime Manhattan location at 870 7th Avenue, accessible 24/7 via hotel lobby
cons: As a non-bank entity, less regulatory oversight than traditional financial institutions
24/7 machine rates reportedly differ from in-store rates per customer feedback
Limited service expansion beyond single NYC location despite 20+ year history
Exchange rates are commodity-based and highly competitive, requiring rate shopping
No information on dispute resolution or customer protection policies publicly available
best_for: International travelers and tourists in NYC needing same-day currency exchange
Business professionals and corporate accounts requiring frequent foreign exchange
Individuals sending remittances internationally seeking competitive rates
Residents of Manhattan needing 24/7 emergency currency access
diagnosis: Uno Forex is best suited for NYC-based international travelers, businesses, and individuals needing competitive currency exchange and money transfers without commission on larger transactions. The main caveat is that exchange rates are inherently competitive and fluctuate constantly, so while reviews praise their rates relative to local competitors, customers should verify rates before committing, and the company's value proposition depends entirely on real-time rate comparison.
services: In-store currency exchange during business hours
Money transfer services to send funds worldwide
No-commission exchanges for transactions over $300 USD

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 870 7th Ave, New York, NY 10019, USA
